mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ADMIN_AUTH_LOG (SELECT add_id, #{os}, #{browser}, #{ip}, sysdate, member_group_idx, auth_code_id, '-', module_type, menu_idx, module_idx, site_id FROM WB_MEMBER_GROUP_AUTH_TEMP a WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT * FROM WB_MEMBER_GROUP_AUTH b WHERE b.member_group_idx = #{member_group_idx} AND a.menu_idx = b.menu_idx AND a.module_idx = b.module_idx AND a.auth_code_id = b.auth_code_id) ) UNION ALL (SELECT add_id, #{os}, #{browser}, #{ip}, sysdate, member_group_idx, auth_code_id, '+', module_type, menu_idx, module_idx, site_id FROM WB_MEMBER_GROUP_AUTH a WHERE member_group_idx = #{member_group_idx} AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT * FROM WB_MEMBER_GROUP_AUTH_TEMP b WHERE a.menu_idx = b.menu_idx AND a.module_idx = b.module_idx AND a.auth_code_id = b.auth_code_id) )
